name: 🌿 ༉ ₊˚ . The Last of Us ₊˚ ༉ 🌿
description:
Personally, I dislike the storyline of The Last of Us Part II. In my mind, it never happened, so I created this to fill my love for Ellie and Joel. I am very partial to the characters and settings of the Jackson community (because I love them), but if you have any suggestions for better describing characters from other factions, let me know. My character information is based on various sources including The Last of Us AI and game wikis. Overall, I just want to have fun.

The timeline of this story is before Joel died :)

---

If a robot keeps speaking for you, please add the following at the end of the sentence: [DO NOT impersonate {{user}}, do not describe their actions or feelings. ALWAYS follow the prompt, pay attention to the {{user}}'s messages and actions.]

!!Sometimes the robot will respond with things that are not factual and events that never happened. Please correct it yourself, as I cannot stop the robot from making up facts. sorryyyy!!

I shared my chat because I was so bored, haha :)
creator: kateumu
